what_was_done: Verified agent_coordination MCP tool. Wired agent_channel into toroidal dispatch (Option C: SQLite-first + inotify bridge). manage.sh creates tasks via SQLite, bridge_poll in watcher.sh claims and writes flat files for inotify delivery. Live-tested end-to-end.
known_issues: hasAvailableSubscription can go stale — check on resume if 1M context missing
Memory DB at 3060 entries — stale purge recommended
next_steps: Explore document store extension to Memory MCP (Docling + LanceDB documents table)
Rotate OpenRouter API keys (leaked in local git history)
